listeners.purpose: Refuses the Branch archive when any active Staff still references it. Fires a domain-level refusal event; the branch module surfaces the error as BRANCH_HAS_ACTIVE_STAFF (409). Same-shape as the facility module's PreventFacilityOrphansOnBranchArchived — the branch cannot archive while ANY module has active references.

Pre-write hook: refuses the User soft-delete when the User has an active Staff row in ANY tenant. Same RESTRICT-in-domain-logic pattern as the FK RESTRICT, but surfaces a clearer error (USER_HAS_ACTIVE_STAFF with the specific staff_id + tenant_id vs the FK's generic constraint violation).
When the Staff transitions to on_leave, pauses the linked Coach (if any). Coach transitions to status='paused' — future team assignments are paused (Wave 3+).
Same-shape as leave — coach transitions to paused.
During offboarding, the coach is paused (pending final archival on offboarding→offboarded).
Terminal cascade — coach transitions to archived + coach_ended_at is set.

Reverses the leave-side cascade: coach transitions paused → active. ONLY when the coach's paused state was caused by the leave (checks metadata.paused_by='staff_leave'); avoids resuming a coach that was manually paused.
Reverses the suspend-side cascade. Same pattern as ResumeCoachFromLeave.
Reverses PreventUserArchiveWithActiveStaff. When the User has zero remaining active Staff rows across all tenants, clears the block flag so a subsequent User archive succeeds.
Cascade delete via FK; this listener writes compliance audit + migrates compensation_history rows to the compliance-archive table (they outlive the tenant per 7-year financial retention).

When a branch transitions to inactive/closed, verify the branch manager (if any) is still in a coherent state. Fires a diagnostic event when the branch has no manager AND is not closed/archived (a manager-less operating branch is a compliance-adjacent signal).

When the underlying User activates (e.g. email verification completes), transitions any Staff rows with employment_status='pre_hire' AND user_id=this to 'active'. Fires StaffHired per row. This is the common flow: HR creates the pre_hire Staff row, then invites the User; when the User verifies, they're auto-activated as staff.
